author.bio: Serving your sites over HTTPS+HTTP/2 automatically. On a mission to put every site on HTTPS! Visit our forum for help: http://caddy.community
author.name: Caddy Web Server

content.text: The http.filemanager plugin recently usurped http.git as the #1 most-downloaded plugin. Both are awesome! Filemanager by @hacdias lets you manage files on your server, and Git by @abiosoft lets you deploy your site with git push!
content.html: The http.filemanager plugin recently usurped http.git as the #1 most-downloaded plugin. Both are awesome! Filemanager by @hacdias lets you manage files on your server, and Git by @abiosoft lets you deploy your site with git push!
